items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 19:1
items.html: Here in SAG, the screen consists of records of two Partzufim: its own Partzuf, and Partzuf Galgalta of AK. (Inner Light, Item 6)
